mapper.sql: alevel_source_file_id, alevel_paper_id, bundle_code, source_file_type, source_file_name, source_file_hash, storage_path, asset_url, page_count, parse_status, parse_result_json, parse_warning_json, import_version, is_verified, status, error_message, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_source_file WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_source_file WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time ASC, alevel_source_file_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_source_file WHERE bundle_code = #{bundleCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time ASC, alevel_source_file_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_source_file SET alevel_paper_id = #{paperId}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId}

UPDATE alevel_source_file SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_result_json = #{parseResultJson}, parse_warning_json = #{parseWarningJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId}
